2604.20771.title: DAIRE: A lightweight AI model for real-time detection of Controller Area Network attacks in the Internet of Vehicles
2604.20771.paper_summary: The Internet of Vehicles (IoV) is advancing modern transportation by improving safety, efficiency, and intelligence. However, the reliance on the Controller Area Network (CAN) introduces critical security risks, as CAN-based communication is highly vulnerable to cyberattacks. Addressing this challenge, we propose DAIRE (Detecting Attacks in IoV in REal-time), a lightweight machine learning framework designed for real-time detection and classification of CAN attacks. DAIRE is built on a lightweight artificial neural network (ANN) where each layer contains Ni = i x c neurons, with Ni representing the number of neurons in the ith layer and c corresponding to the total number of attack classes. Other hyperparameters are determined empirically to ensure real-time operation. To support the detection and classification of various IoV attacks, such as Denial-of-Service, Fuzzy, and Spoofing, DAIRE employs the sparse categorical cross-entropy loss function and root mean square propagation for loss minimization. In contrast to more resource-intensive architectures, DAIRE leverages a lightweight ANN to reduce computational demands while still delivering strong performance. Experimental results on the CICIoV2024 and Car-Hacking datasets demonstrate DAIRE's effectiveness, achieving an average detection rate of 99.88%, a false positive rate of 0.02%, and an overall accuracy of 99.96%. Furthermore, DAIRE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in inference speed, with a classification time of just 0.03 ms per sample. These results highlight DAIRE's effectiveness in detecting IoV cyberattacks and its practical suitability for real-time deployment in vehicular systems, underscoring its vital role in strengthening automotive cybersecurity.
2604.20771.paper_summary_zh: 物聯網車輛（IoV）透過提升安全性、效率和智能化，推進現代交通運輸。然而，對控制器區域網路（CAN）的依賴引入了關鍵的安全風險，因為基於CAN的通信對網路攻擊高度脆弱。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了DAIRE（即時檢測IoV攻擊），這是一個輕量級的機器學習框架，旨在實現CAN攻擊的即時檢測和分類。DAIRE建立在一個輕量級的人工神經網路（ANN）上，其中每一層包含Ni = i x c個神經元，Ni代表第i層中的神經元數量，c對應於攻擊類別的總數。其他超參數是通過實證確定的，以確保即時運行。為了支持對各種IoV攻擊的檢測和分類，如拒絕服務、模糊和偽造，DAIRE採用了稀疏類別交叉熵損失函數和均方根傳播來最小化損失。與更資源密集型的架構相比，DAIRE利用輕量級的ANN來減少計算需求，同時仍能提供強大的性能。在CICIoV2024和Car-Hacking數據集上的實驗結果顯示，DAIRE的有效性，實現了99.88%的平均檢測率、0.02%的假陽性率和99.96%的整體準確率。此外，DAIRE在推理速度上顯著超越了最先進的方法，每個樣本的分類時間僅為0.03毫秒。這些結果突顯了DAIRE在檢測IoV網路攻擊方面的有效性及其在車輛系統中即時部署的實用性，強調了其在加強汽車網路安全中的重要角色。
2604.20771.author: Shahid Alam et.al.
2604.20771.authors: Shahid Alam, Amina Jameel, Zahida Parveen, Ehab Alnfrawy, Adeela Ashraf, Raza Uddin, Jamal Aqib
